title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 21 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 21 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 3.53%. the main contract I2405 closed 968, Some traders adopt separate quotations；Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 996-1000 yuan/mt; increased 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday.
